member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.InMemoryTenantStore
member.summary: Simple in-memory implementation of . Use for unit tests, demos, and local development. Not suitable for production multi-instance deployments.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.InMemoryTenantStore.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo})
member.summary: Initializes the store with an optional seed of tenants.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantContext
member.summary: Provides access to the current tenant context for the active request or execution scope. Inject this interface anywhere you need to know which tenant is in context.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantContext.CurrentTenant
member.summary: Gets the current tenant's information.
member.exception: Thrown if accessed when is false.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantContext.HasTenant
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a tenant has been resolved for the current context.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantContext.CreateTenantScope(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an isolated DI scope for the specified tenant, setting ITenantContext to that tenant within the scope. Useful for background jobs.
member.param: The tenant identifier to scope to.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the current tenant from an incoming HTTP request. Implement this interface to create a custom resolution strategy. Multiple resolvers can be registered; they are tried in order until one succeeds.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantResolver.ResolveAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve a from the given HTTP context. Returns null if this resolver cannot determine the tenant.
member.returns: The resolved tenant, or null if not resolvable by this strategy.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore
member.summary: Provides persistent storage and retrieval of records. Implement this to back tenants with a database, configuration file, or any other source.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore.GetTenantAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a tenant by its unique identifier. Returns null if not found.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore.GetAllTenantsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all tenants known to the store.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore.AddTenantAsync(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new tenant to the store.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore.UpdateTenantAsync(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing tenant in the store.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ITenantStore.RemoveTenantAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a tenant from the store.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder returned by . Use the With* extension methods from each package to register features.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder.Services
member.summary: Gets the underlying service collection.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder.Options
member.summary: Gets the configured options.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantStore
member.summary: Specifies where tenants are persisted.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantStore.InMemory
member.summary: In-memory store — for development and testing only.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantStore.EntityFramework
member.summary: Tenants are stored in a database via Entity Framework Core.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantStore.Configuration
member.summary: Tenants are loaded from appsettings.json configuration.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.IsolationStrategy
member.summary: Specifies the database isolation strategy for tenant data.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.IsolationStrategy.DbPerTenant
member.summary: Each tenant gets a completely separate database.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.IsolationStrategy.SchemaPerTenant
member.summary: All tenants share a database but use separate schemas.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.IsolationStrategy.RowLevel
member.summary: All tenants share tables; data is filtered by a TenantId column.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyOptions
member.summary: Top-level configuration options for the multi-tenancy library. Configure via the AddMultitenancy(options => ...) builder.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyOptions.TenantStore
member.summary: Gets or sets where tenant records are persisted. Default: .

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyOptions.IsolationStrategy
member.summary: Gets or sets the database isolation strategy. Default: .

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyOptions.RequireTenant
member.summary: When true, a request with no resolvable tenant returns HTTP 404. When false, the request proceeds with == false. Default: false.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyOptions.TenantNotFoundStatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code returned when tenant resolution fails and is true. Default: 404.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering multi-tenancy services with the DI container and adding the tenant middleware to the pipeline.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMultitenancy(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyOptions})
member.summary: Registers the core multi-tenancy services and returns a for further configuration via With* extension methods.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.ServiceCollectionExtensions.UseMultitenancy(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds the to the ASP.NET Core pipeline. Call this in app.Use*() — before any routing or authorization middleware.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantContext
member.summary: Default implementation of . Registered as a scoped service so it is unique per HTTP request.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantContext.SetTenant(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo)
member.summary: Sets the current tenant. Called by after resolution.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo
member.summary: Represents a tenant in the system. All properties needed for routing, database isolation, and feature access live here.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo.Id
member.summary: Unique slug identifier for the tenant (e.g., "acme"). Used as the key for resolution and path prefixing.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo.Name
member.summary: Human-readable display name (e.g., "Acme Corp").

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo.ConnectionString
member.summary: Connection string for DB-per-tenant isolation strategy. Leave empty for schema-per-tenant or row-level strategies.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo.Schema
member.summary: Database schema name for schema-per-tenant isolation (e.g., "acme"). Leave empty for DB-per-tenant or row-level strategies.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo.Plan
member.summary: Subscription plan identifier. Used for feature flag gating. Typical values: "free", "pro", "enterprise".

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo.Settings
member.summary: Arbitrary key-value settings for tenant-specific configuration.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this tenant is active. Inactive tenants are rejected during resolution.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantInfo.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the tenant was created (UTC).

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware that runs all registered s in order and populates for the request.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantNotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when a tenant cannot be resolved from the current HTTP request, and the application requires a valid tenant context.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantNotFoundException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with a default message.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified tenant identifier.
member.param: The tenant ID that could not be found.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with a message and inner exception.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.TenantNotFoundException.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant ID that triggered the exception, if available.
